content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 7, 0), (6, 7, 2), (1, 8, 3), (3, 8, 3), (3, 5, 4), (4, 8, 4), (0, 2, 5), (3, 6, 6), (4, 6, 6), (0, 5, 8), (0, 7, 9), (2, 7, 11), (1, 9, 12), (6, 9, 13), (1, 3, 14), (0, 8, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 9.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (3, 7, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (6, 7, 2) has node 6 and time 2. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 8, 3) has node 1 and time 3. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 8, 3) has node 3 and time 3. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 5, 4) has node 3 and time 4. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 8, 4) has node 4 and time 4. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 2, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (3, 6, 6) has node 3 and time 6. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 6, 6) has node 4 and time 6. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 5, 8) has node 0 and time 8. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 7, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 7, 11) has node 2 and time 11. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 9, 12) has node 1 and time 12. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 9, 13) has node 6 and time 13. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 3, 14) has node 1 and time 14. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (0, 8, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 8.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 0 at time 9. The answer is: [7, 8, 5, 6, 9].

Answer: [7, 8, 5, 6, 9]
